Hi {{CandidateFirstName}},

Thank you for taking the time to complete our pre-screen for the {{RoleName}} role at {{ShopName}} — we genuinely appreciate the effort.

We want to be straightforward with you: at this time, we are not actively moving forward with new hires for this position. This is not a reflection of your application — it is simply where we are right now as a business.

We will keep your information on file. If things change and a position opens up that looks like a strong fit, we will reach back out. You are also always welcome to check back at {{ShopWebsite}}.
